p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 new p2p repo_tests: test_repo_powershell_script_structure, test_repo_skill_md_structure, test_repo_powershell_no_syntax_errors, test_repo_files_encoding_and_size. All pass on base commit. CI tools explored: No PowerShell (pwsh) available in container. Repo is .NET MAUI with GitHub workflows for spellcheck, autoformat, and triage - none applicable to the PowerShell skill files. Used Python-based structural validation via subprocess.run() as actual CI commands.
